title: The Pirate Update
description: This Mod adds New Items, and a Few weapons, With NEW ORES TO FIND
body:
# The Pirate Update

## Features/Description 
- In this Mod you will feel like a pirate, no YOU WILL be a Pirate, Using your newly found weapons, such as 
- YOUR Cutlass, to destory anything in you way, or a 
- dagger, to get the job done and fast, maybe your more on the fire arm side, then you can use your 
- Musket to shot monsters, from far away, and if you dont want such a big fire arm use your 
- pistol, to stop monsters in there tracks, and the way to craft such weaopons, you will need to new ore, Such as, 
- Silver, 
- Rubys, and 
- Citrine, which each of the new ores have Tools and Amour
